---
name: New Entry Request
about: Suggest a new knowledge entry
title: "[ENTRY] "
labels: ["new-entry"]
assignees: ''
---

## What pattern should be added?

Describe the coding pattern, library feature, or common mistake that should be documented.

## Language

Which language does this apply to? (python, java, typescript, go, rust, csharp, bash, sql, etc.)

## Category

Which category fits best? (stdlib, web, db, testing, patterns, concurrency, security, devops, etc.)

## Why is this needed?

Explain why models commonly get this wrong. Have you seen a small model hallucinate this API or make this mistake?

## Example of the mistake

Show an example of what a model typically gets WRONG:

```python
# WRONG: Model often writes this
```

## Correct pattern

Show what the correct code should look like:

```python
# CORRECT: This is how it should be done
```

## Additional context

Any links to official documentation, common Stack Overflow questions, or other references.
